landing.heroSubtitle: Turning Every Citizen's Voice into Smarter Development Decisions.
landing.heroDesc: JanSwar AI empowers MPs and local administrations to track, analyze, and resolve civic issues using real-time data and AI-driven insights.
landing.feature1Desc: Automatically categorizes and prioritizes citizen complaints to highlight critical bottlenecks instantly.
landing.feature2Desc: Live dashboards track progress across villages, wards, and administrative blocks for full transparency.
landing.feature3Desc: Anticipate infrastructure needs before they become crises using our predictive analytics models.

login.desc: Sign in or create an account to get started

dashboard.citizenDesc: Track your suggestions and community progress.
dashboard.mpDesc: Monitor infrastructure gaps and AI recommendations.
